requirement_topic.en: Customs Processing — GCNet / Ghana Revenue Authority (Import Declaration and Duties)
requirement_topic.zh: 海关处理——GCNet / 加纳税务局（进口申报及关税）
requirement_topic.zht: 海關處理——GCNet / 加納稅務局（進口申報及關稅）

summary.en: All imports into Ghana are processed through the Ghana Community Network Services (GCNet) electronic single-window platform, which interfaces with Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA) Customs Division. An import declaration (Form M or equivalent) must be filed via GCNet prior to or upon arrival of goods. Wireless and electronics products are subject to import duty, VAT (currently 15%), and the NHIL/GETFund levies. A valid NCA type approval certificate must be presented to customs for wireless devices. The importer of record must hold a valid Tax Identification Number (TIN) with GRA. ECOWAS Trade Liberalisation Scheme (ETLS) tariff preferences may apply for goods originating in ECOWAS member states but not for Chinese-origin goods.
summary.zh: 所有进口到加纳的货物须通过加纳社区网络服务（GCNet）电子单一窗口平台处理，该平台与加纳税务局（GRA）海关部门对接。须在货物抵达前或抵达时通过GCNet提交进口申报（M表格或同等文件）。无线及电子产品须缴纳进口关税、增值税（目前为15%）及NHIL/GETFund附加税。无线设备须向海关提交有效的NCA型式认可证书。记录在案的进口商须持有GRA颁发的有效税务识别号码（TIN）。ECOWAS贸易自由化计划（ETLS）关税优惠适用于ECOWAS成员国原产货物，不适用于中国原产货物。
summary.zht: 所有進口到加納的貨物須通過加納社區網路服務（GCNet）電子單一窗口平台處理，該平台與加納稅務局（GRA）海關部門對接。須在貨物抵達前或抵達時通過GCNet提交進口申報（M表格或同等文件）。無線及電子產品須繳納進口關稅、增值稅（目前為15%）及NHIL/GETFund附加稅。無線裝置須向海關提交有效的NCA型式認可證書。記錄在案的進口商須持有GRA頒發的有效稅務識別號碼（TIN）。ECOWAS貿易自由化計畫（ETLS）關稅優惠適用於ECOWAS成員國原產貨物，不適用於中國原產貨物。

standards_or_laws: ECOWAS Trade Liberalisation Scheme (ETLS) — not applicable to Chinese-origin goods
NCA Type Approval Certificate (required at customs for wireless devices)

summary.en: Chinese exports to Ghana are processed through China Customs under the Customs Law of the PRC, with a standard export declaration (export customs form) and applicable export duties (typically zero for consumer electronics). China-Ghana trade does not benefit from any free trade agreement or preferential tariff scheme as of 2026. Standard MFN tariff rates apply on the Ghana side for Chinese-origin electronics.
summary.zh: 中国向加纳的出口货物依据《中华人民共和国海关法》通过中国海关处理，提交标准出口申报单，适用出口关税（消费类电子产品通常为零）。截至2026年，中加贸易不享受任何自由贸易协定或优惠关税安排，加纳对中国原产电子产品适用标准最惠国税率。
summary.zht: 中國向加納的出口貨物依據《中華人民共和國海關法》通過中國海關處理，提交標準出口申報單，適用出口關稅（消費類電子產品通常為零）。截至2026年，中加貿易不享受任何自由貿易協定或優惠關稅安排，加納對中國原產電子產品適用標準最惠國稅率。

standards_or_laws: Customs Law of the PRC (export declaration)
MOFCOM export controls (where applicable to controlled goods)
China-Ghana bilateral trade — MFN rates apply (no FTA as of 2026)

gap.en: Full gap: Ghana requires GCNet electronic import declaration, GRA TIN for the importer of record, presentation of NCA type approval certificate at customs, and payment of import duty + 15% VAT + NHIL/GETFund levies. No China-Ghana FTA exists so standard MFN tariff rates apply. ETLS preferences do not extend to Chinese-origin goods. A local Ghanaian importer with a GRA TIN must act as importer of record.
gap.zh: 完全差距：加纳要求通过GCNet提交电子进口申报单，记录在案的进口商须持有GRA税务识别号，海关须提交NCA型式认可证书，并缴纳进口关税+15%增值税+NHIL/GETFund附加税。中加之间没有自由贸易协定，适用标准最惠国税率。ETLS优惠不适用于中国原产货物。持有GRA税务识别号的加纳当地进口商须担任记录在案的进口商。
gap.zht: 完全差距：加納要求通過GCNet提交電子進口申報單，記錄在案的進口商須持有GRA稅務識別號，海關須提交NCA型式認可證書，並繳納進口關稅+15%增值稅+NHIL/GETFund附加稅。中加之間沒有自由貿易協定，適用標準最惠國稅率。ETLS優惠不適用於中國原產貨物。持有GRA稅務識別號的加納當地進口商須擔任記錄在案的進口商。

source.publisher: Ghana Community Network Services (GCNet) / Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GCNet electronic customs declaration and GRA import duties (import duty + 15% VAT + levies) are mandatory for all imports into Ghana. A valid NCA type approval certificate must be presented at customs for wireless devices. A local Ghanaian importer with a GRA TIN must act as importer of record; Chinese-origin goods receive no preferential tariff treatment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GCNet电子海关申报及GRA进口税（进口关税+15%增值税+附加税）适用于所有进入加纳的进口货物。无线设备须在海关提交有效的NCA型式认可证书。持有GRA税务识别号的加纳当地进口商须担任记录在案的进口商；中国原产货物不享有优惠关税待遇。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GCNet電子海關申報及GRA進口稅（進口關稅+15%增值稅+附加稅）適用於所有進入加納的進口貨物。無線裝置須在海關提交有效的NCA型式認可證書。持有GRA稅務識別號的加納當地進口商須擔任記錄在案的進口商；中國原產貨物不享有優惠關稅待遇。
